description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on pull requests, pushes, and published releases. The workflow has two jobs: build and test. The build job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment in a centos:7 container, installing dependencies, building ninja, running tests, creating an archive, and uploading it as an artifact and release asset. The test job runs on ubuntu-20.04, installing dependencies, configuring and building ninja with GCC and Clang, and running unit tests and Python tests.
